title: The Willows
description: A generously proportioned detached residence set behind a sprawling lawn, with a fenced paddock ideal for pets and a timber play frame for little ones. Ample room for children to run and roam in complete safety.

title: Orchard House
description: This characterful home enjoys a mature fruit orchard and an expansive rear meadow. Families will appreciate the enclosed grounds where youngsters and animals can wander freely away from any traffic.

title: Meadowbank
description: Sitting on a substantial plot, the property offers a huge grassed area to the back, a swing set and a secure boundary — perfect for households with young children and energetic hounds.

title: Fielders Rest
description: A spacious family dwelling wrapped by open green space, including a sizeable turfed garden and a dedicated pets' run. The outdoor area is fully bounded, giving toddlers and dogs a safe place to play.

title: Tower View
description: A sleek one-bedroom flat positioned mere moments from the underground line, with several bus routes and a tram halt on the doorstep. Commuting into the centre could scarcely be more effortless.

title: The Exchange
description: This modern apartment sits beside a busy interchange served by frequent rail links and a nearby metro entrance, making the daily journey to the business district quick and painless.

title: Platform Lofts
description: Superbly connected, the residence is a short stroll from the light-rail stop and the mainline station, offering rapid access to the heart of town for car-free professionals.

title: Signal House
description: Ideally placed for the commuter, with tram and bus connections immediately outside and a train terminus within walking distance — reaching downtown takes only minutes without a vehicle.

title: Ivy Manor
description: A distinguished Victorian villa whose original cornicing, fireplaces and sash windows have been painstakingly restored, marrying nineteenth-century craftsmanship with tasteful modern comforts.

title: The Rectory
description: Full of heritage charm, this former parsonage retains its 1800s character — flagstone floors, beamed ceilings and period joinery — all sympathetically refurbished to a high standard.

title: Elm Cottage
description: Steeped in history, the dwelling preserves its antique timber framing and inglenook hearth, thoughtfully updated so that its old-world personality shines alongside contemporary conveniences.

title: Georgian House
description: An elegant early-1900s townhouse where the authentic mouldings, panelled doors and decorative plasterwork have been faithfully revived by skilled artisans without losing their vintage soul.

title: Estuary Reach
description: Perched above the tidal inlet, this property commands a sweeping outlook across the shimmering channel, with boats drifting past and the far shoreline framing every window.

title: Lakeside Lodge
description: Set right at the water's edge, the house looks out over a tranquil mere, its rippling surface and wooded banks providing an ever-changing panorama from the living spaces.

title: Harbour Point
description: Enjoying an enviable coastal aspect, the residence gazes out to the open sea, with wide marine horizons and passing vessels visible from the principal rooms.

title: River Walk
description: Occupying a riverside position, the home overlooks the gently flowing stream, offering serene aquatic vistas and reflections of the opposite bank throughout the day.
